fields.summary: Use app user to publish entities from NM
YARN Timeline Service v2 (post GA features)

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
Currently NM login UGI is used to publish entities from NM to app collector. 
This can lead to writes happening in sub application table. This JIRA is to use app user to publish entities from NM.
